arts.ttl: AFC Wimbledon v Walsall: League Two playoff final – live
arts.sum: League Two playoff final, Wembley, 3.01pm BST kick-off Charlton seal Championship spot | Get in touch on email The last match of the English domestic season sees Wimbledon return to the scene of their most famous coup. Not 2016, but 1988. Walsall looked nailed on to be automatically promoted only to lose their way as the season dragged on. Walsall were 30 seconds from automatic promotion until Antoni Sarcevic’s 96th-minute winner for Bradford to usurp them. Here is their redemption arc but the good people of Earlsfield and Morden will be roaring on their Dons. Kick-off is at 3.01pm, join me. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Preview: AFC Wimbledon vs. Walsall - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Monday's League Two clash between AFC Wimbledon and Walsall, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
